In computer science, Artificial Intelligence (abbreviated AI) is generally the intelligence, reasoning and learning displayed by machines similar to human reason; it seeks to develop autonomous machines or specialized systems capable of simulating human thought and performing several complex tasks independently.
He also outlined a research proposal to make this possible.
Another subfield of study is the connection of AI with Psychology, in an attempt to represent in the machine the mechanisms of reasoning and search.

In recent decades, the field has been exonerated to include sub-areas such as machine learning, artificial neural networks, natural language processing and computational vision, with increasing emphasis on statistical techniques, connecting methods and hybrid approaches that combine symbolic models and deep learning.
Machine Learning (Machine Learning) is a subfield of artificial intelligence, in which a machine learns, that is, is taught from algorithms to perform a given task, understanding a pattern.
